sections.paragraph:
- Original: Βαρτιμαῖος

- Transliteration: Bartimaios

- Phonetic: bar-tim-ah'-yos

- Definition: Bartimaeus = "son of Timaeus"

1. a certain blind man

- Origin: of Aramaic origin H1247 and H2931

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine

- Strong's: Of Chaldee origin [H1247] and [H2931]; son of Timaeus (or the unclean); Bartimaeus an Israelite: - Bartimus.
